title: ARCHIVED - Northwest Territories - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Northwest Territories - 2017 General Income Tax and Benefit package

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
- File online - There are a variety of software products to meet your needs, some of which are free.
- Filing online is fast, easy, and secure. Let us walk you through it step by step. For more information about online filing, go to Get ready to file your 2017 income tax return .
- General Income Tax and Benefit Guide - 2017
- T1 General 2017 - Income Tax and Benefit Return - Northwest Territories
- Schedule 1 - Federal Tax
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2017
- Schedule 4 - Statement of Investment Income
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Working Income Tax Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2017
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Schedule 12 - Home Accessibility Expenses
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings

## Territorial information and forms
- Information Sheet - Residents of the Northwest Territories
- Territorial Worksheet - Northwest Territories
- Form NT428 - Northwest Territories Tax
- Form NT479 - Northwest Territories Credit
- Schedule NT(S2) - Territorial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule NT(S11) - Territorial Tuition and Education Amounts

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
